author: Viktor S.
pros: - better test coverage and helps identify defects early in the development process.- T-Plan helps to identify potential risks and threats to the software application.- communication tool between the development and testing teams.
cons: - can be time-consuming and requires a significant amount of effort from the testing team.- limited scope and may not cover all possible scenarios- may not be comprehensive enough to cover all aspects of the software application, leading to some areas being left untested
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Cross platform mobile testing for Flutter
description: Some good usefull online sessions with [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] in the inital stages, our automation tester has mentioned less success with support requests subsequently. Most of which i think she has worked out herself and successfully writing scripts which are not device or platform specific, run quickly and efficiently with minimal Google Vision API calls when using TOCR.
author: Vincent L.
pros: Image / Text OCR based automation tested allowed out testers to write automation scripts on our cross platform mobile application with a shallow learning curve. The Robot application runs on Mac, Windows and Linux.
cons: Quite fussy about the Java version installed, if its not supported it runs but some things don't work. Unable to connect to simulated/emulated mobile devices so you have to buy physical devices.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Everyone has been very helpful along the process from trial to purchase.
author: Derek M.
pros: I like the scripting capability along with the OCR and search features for finding attributes on the UI. The automation capability is also good in order to use from Jenkins builds servers.
cons: The cost was the biggest hurdle to overcome when purchasing the product..
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: - Helps us test software before and during deployment - It was quite simple to write automation scripts on the platform - Strong proactive support team
cons: Depending on your (at least for us) existing infrastructure, some flaws can occur - in our case with the Java version installed. Nothing huge and also not necessarly T-Plan's issue, just to keep in mind when making the decision.

description: TPlan allowed us to test the deployed software efficiently and effectively. The support was top notch and would recommend reaching out quickly vs slogging to find the solution. Sales was awesome and worked to come up with a solution that can be supported by all people. Our app is a COVID app which needed a bunch of complicated scenarios. TPlan was able to support those user stories and scenarios without issue.
author: Kevin D.
pros: The software is able to test mobile software "in-situ" ... it also tests the software as deployed.
cons: Getting things to work on iOS is challenging but once running is successful ... and not a TPlan problem per say.

description: Automating AOSP based UI was made easy using T Plan.
author: Deepak M.
pros: Ease of setup and being able to support multiple platforms.
cons: Improve user interface and tutorial documentation.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Adorján C.
pros: Easy to learn, intuitive, can make everyting with it we want. Very kind and proactive support! thank you!
cons: With our software we can use only ocr, to detect buttons and other controls. This is out software fault, but we cannot use any third party robot testers because of it.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
